n: The Journey to the Whin Hill
no: IWD-style adventure for BG2. Search for a missing man in the Whin Hill area, facing wyverns and uncovering a dangerous settlement
sum: IWD-style adventure for BG2 where players search for a man in the Whin Hill area, facing wyverns and uncovering the mystery behind a dangerous settlement.

co.n: Yes, but don't patch existing save games

co.no: New game required. Recommended for fresh EET installs
